name: improve
description: Use when producing agent/LLM evals, synthetic simulation data, or self-improvement pipelines for prompts, code, skills, agents, harnesses, and workflows. Covers AgentEvals/AgentV, Agent Skills evals, ASSERT, GEPA, Trace, VISTA, Agent Lightning, SkillOpt, Simula-style data design, progressive disclosure, deterministic workspaces, and release evidence.
author: Tyler-R-Kendrick
